chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 486 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA 8132/2025. 28.11.2025. Mr. Agha Waqar Ahmed, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = Counsel for the applicant does not press the listed contempt application, the same is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Tufail
